revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24644718927|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:朝山神社]] {{Expand Japanese|朝山神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Asayama Shrine | native_name = 朝山神社 | image = Asayamajinjahonden.JPG | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Asayama Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.319291|132.772816}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Asayama Shrine'''|朝山神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izumo Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Q135026601|ltq=Q135026601|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Izumo Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Izumo Province|ja|出雲国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11395853|1=List of Shikinaisha in Izumo Province}} ** Series ordinal: 153 ** P155: {{ill|Q135041074|ltq=Q135041074|qid=Q135041074|1=Kantamakotsunotama Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Arino Shrine|lt=Arino Shrine|qid=Q135041075|1=Arino Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q825166|ltq=Q825166|qid=Q825166|1=Izumo, Shimane}} * {{ill|Q582846|ltq=Q582846|qid=Q582846|1=Izumo Province}} * {{ill|Kando district|lt=Kando district|ja|神門郡|zh|神門郡|qid=Q11591020|1=Kando district}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|35.319291|132.772816}} == image (P18) == * Asayamajinjahonden.JPG == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 182923 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q90139226|ltq=Q90139226|qid=Q90139226|1=Ken-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Q3029647|ltq=Q3029647|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Japan|lt=Japan|ab|Иапониа|ace|Jeupang|ady|Японие|af|Japan|als|Japan|alt|Јопон|ami|Ripon|am|ጃፓን|ang|Iapan|anp|जापान|an|Chapón|arc|ܝܦܢ|ar|اليابان|arnews|تصنيف:اليابان|arquote|اليابان|ary|الجاپون|arz|اليابان|ast|Xapón|as|জাপান|atj|Japan|avk|Nipona|av|Япония|awa|जापान|ay|Nihun|azb|ژاپون|az|Yaponiya|azquote|Yaponiya|ban|Jepang|bar|Japan|bat_smg|Japuonėjė|ba|Япония|bbc|Japang|bcl|Hapon|bdr|Gipun|be_x_old|Японія|be|Японія|bew|Jepang|bg|Япония|bgnews|Категория:Япония|bh|जापान|bi|Japan|bjn|Japang|blk|ဂျပန်ခမ်းထီ|bm|Japan|bn|জাপান|bnquote|জাপান|bnvoyage|জাপান|bo|ཉི་ཧོང་།|bpy|জাপান|br|Japan|bs|Japan|bsnews|Kategorija:Japan|btm|Jepang|bug|ᨍᨛᨄ|bxr|Япон Улас|ca|Japó|canews|Categoria:Japó|caquote|Japó|cbk_zam|Japón|cdo|Nĭk-buōng|ceb|Hapon|ce|Ипнойчоь|chr|ᏣᏩᏂᏏ|ch|Chapan|chy|Japan|ckb|ژاپۆن|co|Giappone|crh|Japon|csb|Japòńskô|cs|Japonsko|csnews|Kategorie:Japonsko|csquote|Japonsko|csvoyage|Japonsko|cu|Ꙗпѡнїꙗ|cv|Япони|cy|Japan|dag|Japan|da|Japan|de|Japan|denews|Kategorie:Japan|dequote|Japan|devoyage|Japan|din|Japan|diq|Japonya|dsb|Japańska|dtp|Jepun|dty|जापान|dv|ޖަޕާނު|dz|ཇ་པཱན|ee|Japan|el|Ιαπωνία|elnews|Κατηγορία:Ιαπωνία|elquote|Ιαπωνία|elvoyage|Ιαπωνία|eml|Giapòṅ|en|Japan|ennews|Category:Japan|enquote|Japan|envoyage|Japan|eo|Japanio|eonews|Kategorio:Japanujo|eoquote|Japanio|eovoyage|Japanio|es|Japón|esnews|Categoría:Japón|esquote|Japón|esvoyage|Japón|et|Jaapan|etquote|Jaapan|eu|Japonia|ext|Japón|fa|ژاپن|fanews|رده:ژاپن|faquote|ژاپن|favoyage|ژاپن|ff|Japan|fiu_vro|Jaapan|fi|Japani|finews|Luokka:Japani|fivoyage|Japani|fj|Japani|fo|Japan|frp|Japon|frr|Jaapan|fr|Japon|frnews|Catégorie:Japon|frquote|Japon|frvoyage|Japon|fur|Gjapon|fy|Japan|gag|Yaponiya|gan|日本|ga|An Мастор|my|ဂျပန်နိုင်ငံ|mzn|جاپون|nap|Giappone|nds_nl|Japan|nds|Japan|ne|जापान|new|जापान|nia|Jepang|nl|Japan|nlnews|Categorie:Japan|nlvoyage|Japan|nn|Japan|nov|Japan|no|Japan|nqo|ߗ߭ߊߔߐ߲߫|nrm|Japon|nr|Japane|nso|Japane|nv|Binááʼádaałtsʼózí Dineʼé Bikéyah|ny|Japan|oc|Japon|olo|Japounii|om|Jaappaan|or|ଜାପାନ|os|Япон|pag|Hapon|pam|Hapon|pap|Hapon|pa|ਜਪਾਨ|pcd|Japon|pcm|Japan|pdc|Japan|pfl|Japan|pl|Japonia|plnews|Kategoria:Japonia|plquote|Japonia|plvoyage|Japonia|pms|Giapon|pnb|جاپان|pnt|Ιαπωνία|ps|جاپان|pt|Japão|ptnews|Categoria:Japão|ptquote|Japão|ptvoyage|Japão|pwn|Dripun|qu|Hapun|rm|Giapun|rmy|Japan|rn|Yapon|roa_rup|Japonia|roa_tara|Giappone|ro|Japonia|ronews|Categorie:Japonia|rovoyage|Japonia|rue|Японія|ru|Япония|runews|Категория:Япония|ruvoyage|Япония|rw|Ubuyapani|sah|Дьоппуон|sat|ᱡᱟᱯᱟᱱ|sa|जपान्|scn|Giappuni|sco|Japan|sc|Giapone|sd|جاپان|se|Jáhpan|sg|Zapöo|shn|မိူင်းၵျႃႇပၢၼ်ႇ|sh|Japan|simple|Japan|si|ජපානය|skr|جاپان|sk|Japonsko|sl|Japonska|smn|Jaapaan|sm|Iapani|sn|Japani|so|Jabaan|sq|Japonia|sqnews|Kategoria:Japoni|srn|Japan|sr|Јапан|srnews|Категорија:Јапан|srquote|Јапан|ss|IJapani|stq|Japan|st|Japane|su|Jepang|sv|Japan|svnews|Kategori:Japan|svvoyage|Japan|sw|Japani|syl|ꠎꠣꠙꠣꠘ|szl|Japůńijo|szy|Zipun|ta|யப்பான்|tanews|பகுப்பு:ஜப்பான்|tay|Gipun|tcy|ಜಪಾನ್|tdd|ᥛᥫᥒᥰ ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * あさやまじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 7280005002899 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '島根県出雲市朝山町1404', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:朝山神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11517384}} == Japanese content == {{Shrine |Name = Asayama Shrine |Image = [[File:Asayamajinjahonden.JPG|270px|Asayama Shrine main hall]]
Main hall |Location = {{ill|lt=Shimane Prefecture|Q132751|qid=Q132751|1=Shimane Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Izumo City|Q825166|qid=Q825166|1=Izumo, Shimane}} Asayama-chō 1404 |Coordinates = {{Wikicoordinates 2-stage degrees minutes seconds|35|19|9|N|132|46|21|E|}} |Enshrined deity = {{ill|lt=Matamatsukutamanomurahime|UNKNOWN|lt=Matama Tsuku Tama no Murahime no Mikoto}} |Shrine rank = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}
Former {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Prefectural shrine|1=UNKNOWN}} |Founded = |Main hall style = {{ill|lt=Taisha-zukuri|Q387874|qid=Q387874|1=Taisha-zukuri}} |Alternate name = Kumoi Falls Daimyōjin |Annual festival = April 10 |Rituals = Kamiari Festival |Map = {{Location map|Japan Shimane|label=Asayama Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Asayama Shrine''' (Asayama Jinja) is a Shinto shrine located in Asayama-chō, {{ill|lt=Izumo City|Q825166|qid=Q825166|1=Izumo, Shimane}}, {{ill|lt=Shimane Prefecture|Q132751|qid=Q132751|1=Shimane Prefecture}}. It is enshrined on a mountain identified with Ubitaki-yama recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izumo-no-Kuni Fudoki|Q11395858|qid=Q11395858|1=Izumo-no-Kuni Fudoki}}'', and the area surrounding the shrine is designated as “Asayama Forest Park.” === Enshrined deities === {{ill|lt=Matamatsukutamanomurahime|UNKNOWN|lt='''Matama Tsuku Tama no Murahime no Mikoto'''}} (またまつくたまのむらひめのみこと) {{ill|qid=Q3275901|lt=Kamimusubi|UNKNOWN|lt='''Kamimusubi no Mikoto'''|1=Kamimusubi}} (かみむすひのみこと) {{ill|lt=Ōkuninushi|Q276944|qid=Q276944|lt='''Ōnamuchi no Mikoto'''|1=Ōkuninushi}} (おおなむちのみこと) In the entry for Asayama-gō of {{ill|lt=Kando District|Q11591020|qid=Q11591020|1=Kando district}} in the ''Izumo-no-Kuni Fudoki,'' it is written: “Kamimusubi no Mikoto’s child, Matama Tsuku Tama no Murahime no Mikoto, resides here. At that time, the Great Deity who created the world, Ōanamuchi no Mikoto, took her as his wife and visited her every morning.” In other words, Matama Tsuku Tama no Murahime no Mikoto was the woman whom Ōanamuchi no Mikoto (i.e., Ōkuninushi) courted as his wife. === History === In the ''Izumo-no-Kuni Fudoki,'' it is recorded as “Asayama Shrine,” and noted as belonging to the {{ill|lt=Jingikan|Q2264720|qid=Q2264720|1=Department of Divinities}}. In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}, it is written as “Asayama Shrine.” In the ''Izumo Fudoki Shō'' of Tenna 3 (1683), it is recorded as “Kamia Sayama Ubitaki Daimyōjin,” and in the ''Unyōshi'' of Kyōhō 2 (1717), as “Kumoi Taki Myōjin.” The mountains of Asayama-gō in Kando District described in the ''Izumo-no-Kuni Fudoki''—namely Ubitaki-yama, Inazumi-yama, Kage-yama, Ina-yama, Hoko-yama, and Kanmuri-yama (commonly called the “Six Sacred Mountains of Asayama”)—are likened in the text to the Great Deity’s clothing, food, dwelling, and weapons. Among these, Ubitaki-yama is described as “the Great Deity’s palace,” with the Great Deity’s clothing, food, and weapons arranged around it. {{ill|lt=Takione Yoshiyuki|Q17160660|qid=Q17160660|1=Yoshiyuki Takioto}} (''Ancient History of the Japanese Archipelago as Seen through the Fudoki,'' {{ill|lt=Heibonsha|Q11482108|qid=Q11482108|1=Heibonsha}} {{ill|lt=Heibonsha Shinsho|Q11482109|qid=Q11482109|1=Heibonsha Shinsho}} 883, 2018, pp. 38–42) states that Asayama-gō can be regarded as the living space of the Great Deity—that is, the place where the shrine of the Great Deity who “created the land under heaven” was built—and argues that before {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōkuninushi|1=UNKNOWN}} came to be enshrined at the present site ({{ill|lt=Izumo Taisha|Q696362|qid=Q696362|1=Izumo-taisha}}), when he was still a deity limited to western Izumo, the center of the sphere of worship may in fact have been Asayama-gō. === Subsidiary shrines === * Hoshimiya Shrine (Sumeragi no Mikoto) * Funako Shrine ({{ill|lt=Sarutahiko|Q3090037|qid=Q3090037|lt=Sarutahiko no Mikoto|1=Sarutahiko Ōkami}}) * Sugio Shrine ({{ill|lt=Toyoukehime|Q2983724|qid=Q2983724|lt=Toyouke Hime no Mikoto|1=Toyouke-hime}}) * Asayama Nineteen Shrines (Yaoyorozu no Kami) === Festivals === The annual festival is held on April 29. From the 1st to the 10th day of the 10th month in the lunar calendar, the {{ill|lt=Kannazuki|Q6364021|qid=Q6364021|lt=Kamiari Festival|1=Kannazuki}} is held, and it is said that the gods who gather here depart for Izumo Taisha on the evening of the 10th [http://www2.pref.shimane.jp/kodai/asayamada.html]. === References === * Kazuhiro Seki, ''An Annotated Study of the “Izumo-no-Kuni Fudoki”'', 2006, {{ill|lt=Akashi Shoten|Q11512528|qid=Q11512528|1=Akashi Shoten}} ISBN 4-7503-2376-4 * Eiji Shirai and Masanori Toki (eds.), ''Shrine Dictionary (New Expanded Popular Edition)'', 1997, {{ill|lt=Tōkyōdō Shuppan|Q11524645|qid=Q11524645|1=Tōkyōdō Shuppan}} ISBN 4-490-10474-X === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Asayama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Asayama Shrine]][[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izumo Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shimane Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izumo Province]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shimane Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Izumo]] [[Category:History of Izumo, Shimane]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Izumo, Shimane]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shimane Prefecture]]
